text: A street scene in a city, likely in Africa. The background features a large, light green, multi-story building with a prominent dark dome structure in the center. The foreground shows a lower, brown building with multiple doors and windows. Several people are sitting on benches outside the lower building. A tall street light pole stands in the middle ground. On the right, a man is walking, and a rickshaw (pedicab) is visible with a driver and a passenger. The sky is overcast.
